business.name: Bloom Aesthetics Clinic
business.hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM

contact.cancellation_policy: 24-hour notice required for cancellations or rescheduling

services.name: Botox
services.description: Anti-wrinkle injections to smooth fine lines and wrinkles. Results typically last 3-6 months.

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Injectable fillers to restore volume, enhance contours, and reduce deep lines. Results typically last 6-18 months depending on area.

services.name: Consultation
services.description: A complimentary 30-minute consultation with our practitioner to discuss your goals, assess suitability, and create a personalised treatment plan.

escalation_triggers: explicit request to speak to a human
questions about complications or side effects requiring medical advice

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book via WhatsApp or through our website. We recommend booking your free consultation first.

faqs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: We require at least 24 hours notice for any cancellations or rescheduling.

faqs.question: Are consultations free?
faqs.answer: Yes, all initial consultations are completely free of charge.

faqs.question: How long do Botox results last?
faqs.answer: Botox results typically last between 3 to 6 months.

faqs.question: How long do filler results last?
faqs.answer: Dermal filler results typically last between 6 to 18 months depending on the treatment area.
